ddls:
CREATE TABLE "applicants" (
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each applicant */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the applicant */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the applicant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the applicant */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the applicant */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date when the application was submitted */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the applicant */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the applicant */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the applicant */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the applicant */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the applicant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the applicant */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the applicant */,
  "current_education_level" TEXT /* Current education level of the applicant */,
  "current_institution" TEXT /* Current institution of the applicant */,
  "gre_score" INTEGER /* GRE score of the applicant */,
  "toefl_score" INTEGER /* TOEFL score of the applicant */,
  "university_rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the university attended by the applicant */,
  "sop" REAL /* Score of the statement of purpose */,
  "lor" REAL /* Score of the letters of recommendation */,
  "cgpa" REAL /* Cumulative GPA of the applicant */,
  "research_experience" INTEGER /* Indicates if the applicant has research experience (1 for yes, 0 for no) */,
  "admitted" INTEGER /* Indicates if the applicant has been admitted (1 for yes, 0 for no) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("applicant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each graduate program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the graduate program */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department offering the program */,
  "application_deadline" TEXT /* Deadline for submitting applications */,
  "program_description" TEXT /* Description of the graduate program */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the program (e.g., 2 years) */,
  "degree_awarded" TEXT /* Degree awarded upon completion (e.g., Master of Science) */,
  "tuition_fee" REAL /* Tuition fee for the program */,
  "admission_requirements" TEXT /* Additional admission requirements and criteria */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the program */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "application_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application status record */,
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the applicant associated with the status */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program to which the applicant applied */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the application (e.g., submitted, under review, decision made) */,
  "date_updated" TEXT /* Date when the status was last updated */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date when the application was submitted */,
  "decision_date" TEXT /* Date when the final decision was made */,
  "decision_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the decision (if rejected) */,
  "interview_date" TEXT /* Date of the interview (if applicable) */,
  "interviewer" TEXT /* Name of the interviewer (if applicable) */,
  "interview_notes" TEXT /* Notes from the interview (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_status_applicant_id FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_id") REFERENCES applicants ("applicant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_status_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admissions_criteria" (
  "criteria_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of admission criteria */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program these criteria apply to */,
  "gre_min" INTEGER /* Minimum GRE score required */,
  "toefl_min" INTEGER /* Minimum TOEFL score required */,
  "cgpa_min" REAL /* Minimum CGPA required */,
  "sop_min" REAL /* Minimum SOP score required */,
  "lor_min" REAL /* Minimum LOR score required */,
  "research_experience_required" INTEGER /* Indicates if research experience is required */,
  "minimum_gre_essay_score" REAL /* Minimum GRE essay score required */,
  "minimum_toefl_speaking_score" INTEGER /* Minimum TOEFL speaking score required */,
  "minimum_toefl_writing_score" INTEGER /* Minimum TOEFL writing score required */,
  "minimum_sop_length" INTEGER /* Minimum length of the statement of purpose in words */,
  "minimum_lor_count" INTEGER /* Minimum number of letters of recommendation required */,
  "additional_requirements" TEXT /* Any additional specific requirements for the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("criteria_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admissions_criteria_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "committees" (
  "committee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each committee member */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program the committee is associated with */,
  "committee_member" TEXT /* Name of the committee member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the committee member (e.g., chair, member) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the committee member */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the committee member */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography or short description of the committee member */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Areas of expertise of the committee member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("committee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_committees_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interviews" (
  "interview_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interview */,
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the applicant being interviewed */,
  "committee_member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the committee member conducting the interview */,
  "interview_date" TEXT /* Date of the interview */,
  "interview_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the interview (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  "interview_type" TEXT /* Type of interview (e.g., in-person, video call) */,
  "interview_location" TEXT /* Location of the interview (if in-person) */,
  "interview_notes" TEXT /* Notes from the interview */,
  "interview_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the interview in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interview_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interviews_committee_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("committee_member_id") REFERENCES committees ("committee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interviews_applicant_id FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_id") REFERENCES applicants ("applicant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "letters_of_recommendation" (
  "lor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each letter of recommendation */,
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the applicant submitting the letter */,
  "recommender_name" TEXT /* Name of the recommender */,
  "relationship" TEXT /* Relationship of the recommender to the applicant */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date when the letter was submitted */,
  "recommender_email" TEXT /* Email address of the recommender */,
  "recommender_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the recommender */,
  "recommender_position" TEXT /* Position of the recommender */,
  "recommendation_text" TEXT /* Text of the recommendation letter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_letters_of_recommendation_applicant_id FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_id") REFERENCES applicants ("applicant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "decisions" (
  "decision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each decision record */,
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the applicant this decision relates to */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program this decision is for */,
  "decision" TEXT /* Final decision made (e.g., admit, reject) */,
  "date_made" TEXT /* Date when the decision was made */,
  "decision_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the decision (if rejected) */,
  "decision_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments regarding the decision */,
  "decision_made_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who made the decision */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("decision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_decisions_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_decisions_applicant_id FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_id") REFERENCES applicants ("applicant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admissions officer, faculty, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography or short description of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Office location of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
